name: Faith Lutheran School
description: Faith Lutheran School is a place to play pickleball in Markesan, WI. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Turning Point
description: Come play pickleball at Turning Point in Princeton, WI! The court surface is concrete. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.
